zh.London Saint Botolph Aldersgate, Middles: 英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 波托爾福 阿爾德斯蓋特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Michael Berwick於1532年出生在英國素可霍沙安時，他的父親Yewin Berwidk28歲，母親Charlotte Larner28歲。他於大約1550年與Katherine Barbara Jennings在英國素可霍沙安結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1602年5月8日在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 波托爾福 阿爾德斯蓋特享年70歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 波托爾福 阿爾德斯蓋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Michael Berwick于1532年出生在英国素可霍沙安时，他的父亲Yewin Berwidk28岁，母亲Charlotte Larner28岁。他于大约1550年与Katherine Barbara Jennings在英国素可霍沙安结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1602年5月8日在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 波托爾福 阿爾德斯蓋特享年70岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 波托爾福 阿爾德斯蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: Berwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name primarily from Berwick-on-Tweed, on the Northumbrian coast at the mouth of the Tweed river, a border town that regularly changed hands between the Scots and the English. Also from any of the places called Berwick in Dorset and elsewhere, Berrick in Oxfordshire, Barwick in Norfolk and Yorkshire, or Barricks in High Easter, Essex. This could also be a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) outlying grange’, from Middle English ber(e)wik ‘outlying grange or farm, demesne farm’ (Old English berewīc ‘barley farm’).

nameMeanings.name: Michael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Michael Berwick was born in 1532, in Horsham, Sussex, England, his father, Yewin Berwidk, was 28 and his mother, Charlotte Larner, was 28. He married Katherine Barbara Jennings about 1550, in Horsham, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 8 May 1602, in London Saint Botolph Aldersgate, Middlesex, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in London Saint Botolph Aldersgate, Middlesex, England.

Il a épousé Katherine Barbara Jennings environ 1550, à Horsham, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 mai 1602, à London Saint Botolph Aldersgate, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à London Saint Botolph Aldersgate, Middlesex, Angleterre.

ko.London Saint Botolph Aldersgate, Middles: 영국 미들레세스 런던 세인트 벗프 알더스가트
ko.lifeSummary: Michael Berwick(이)가 1532년 영국 수세스 호르샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Yewin Berwidk(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Charlotte Larner(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1550년 영국 수세스 호르샤에서 Katherine Barbara Jennings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1602년 5월 8일 영국 미들레세스 런던 세인트 벗프 알더스가트에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 세인트 벗프 알더스가트에 묻혔다.

ru.London Saint Botolph Aldersgate, Middles: лондон сеинт ботолф алдирсгэит, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Michael Berwick родился в 1532 г. в местности хауршам, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Yewin Berwidk было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Charlotte Larner, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Barbara Jennings около 1550 г. в местности хауршам, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 8 мая 1602 г. в местности лондон сеинт ботолф алдирсгэит, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности лондон сеинт ботолф алдирсгэит, миддлесекс, Англия.
